LanguageData.FB_BoneMarrowExtractor.label: bone marrow extractor
LanguageData.FB_BoneMarrowExtractor.description: A rooted extraction organ that strains captive entities into bioferrite and a small flow of hemogel. Its feeding spines make containment less stable.
LanguageData.FB_SynapticInhibitor.label: synaptic inhibitor
LanguageData.FB_SynapticInhibitor.description: A small nerve-anchor that dampens the activity of nearby captive entities, improving containment while it receives hemogel.
